title: Verify 'Cancel Anyway' triggers Incentive Offer pop-up (when enabled)
description: Test that if the incentive offer is enabled via backend, clicking 'Cancel Anyway' on the Loss Aversion pop-up shows the discount offer.
preconditions: User is on the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up for cancellation
The incentive offer is enabled in the backend

steps.description: 1. Click the 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' button

expected_result: A new pop-up appears with the discount offer, e.g., 'Lock in 50% off your first month now.' The offer details should match the backend configuration.
